# phq9.online

> Free validated mental health self-assessments. Public-domain instruments only, client-side scoring, no PII collection.

## Flagship

- [PHQ-9 depression screening test (9 items, 0-27 scale)](https://phq9.online/)

## Screeners

- [PHQ-2 (2-item depression quick screen)](https://phq9.online/phq-2)
- [GAD-7 (7-item generalized anxiety)](https://phq9.online/gad-7)
- [CES-D (20-item NIH epidemiological depression)](https://phq9.online/ces-d)
- [PROMIS Depression Short Form 8a (NIH)](https://phq9.online/promis-depression)
- [Work and Social Adjustment Scale (5-item functional impairment)](https://phq9.online/wsas)
- [WHO-5 Wellbeing Index](https://phq9.online/who-5)

## Reference

- [PHQ-9 history, validation, and citations](https://phq9.online/about-phq9)
- [Universal scoring guide](https://phq9.online/scoring)
- [Severity band interpretation](https://phq9.online/interpretation)
- [Frequently asked questions](https://phq9.online/faq)
- [Crisis resources by country](https://phq9.online/crisis)
- [Side-by-side comparison of all screeners](https://phq9.online/compare)

## Site

- [About this site](https://phq9.online/about)
- [Medical disclaimer](https://phq9.online/disclaimer)
- [Privacy policy](https://phq9.online/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://phq9.online/terms)
- [Contact](https://phq9.online/contact)
